reference_answer: HFR-2 requires filing within 48 hours after the inspection begins.
Yes. The summary was filed on 2026-04-04 at 08:00, within 48 hours after the 2026-04-02 09:15 start.
46 hours and 45 minutes elapsed between 2026-04-02 09:15 and 2026-04-04 08:00.
Amplified music continued for 37 minutes after the 22:00 cutoff.
Compliance memo CM-41 classifies the post-22:00 interval as an overrun.
Technician Mira Sol completed the last confirmed manual temperature check.
52 minutes elapsed between the 08:10 check and the 09:02 alarm.
Yes. QR-9 requires escalation if more than 45 minutes elapse, and 52 minutes elapsed.
